Hello Kitty 4pc Plant Based Lip Balm Gift Set with Tin Girls Makeup Age 3 and Up

Give the gift of cuteness and care with the Hello Kitty 4-Piece Plant-Based Lip Balm Gift Set - specially made for little ones ages 3 and up! This charming set features four colorful, fun-flavored lip balms in a collectible Hello Kitty travel tin, perfect for tiny hands and big imaginations.

Key Features

  • 4PC HELLO KITTY LIP BALM - Includes 4 fun-flavored, colorful lip balms in a collectible Hello Kitty travel tin
  • PLANT-BASED MATERIAL - Made with plant-based, non-toxic ingredients—safe for kids ages 3 and up
  • SOOTHE CHAPPED LIPS - Gently hydrates and softens lips with every swipe
  • GREAT GIFT IDEA - Adorable Hello Kitty design makes it a perfect gift or party favor
  • TRAVEL FRIENDLY - Compact and travel-friendly for on-the-go fun and easy storage

Product Specifications

  • MPN: HK1238GG
  • UPC: 719565500688

Each balm is crafted with plant-based, non-toxic ingredients to keep lips soft, smooth, and safe. Whether it’s a birthday surprise, party favor, or just because, this set brings smiles, sparkle, and sweetness wherever it goes. With Hello Kitty by their side, kids can shine their way - naturally!
